# Project Context

**soc-anom:** Build a small, **procedure-driven SOC**—encode analyst workflows (playbooks/SOPs), then automate routine Tier-1-style steps with human-on-the-loop for sensitive actions. Training (e.g. TryHackMe) feeds playbook design, not the other way around.

**Docs (initial phases):** [docs/README.md](docs/README.md) and [docs/phases/README.md](docs/phases/README.md).

Stack: TBD (likely Python for services/automation; document choices in [docs/phases/phase-2-technical-foundation.md](docs/phases/phase-2-technical-foundation.md))
